title: Oxydectes gossypiifolia
taxonomy: Oxydectes gossypiifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as South Africa, Mozambique, and Kenya. This plant is part of the genus Oxydectes, which is closely related to the genus Commelina. Oxydectes gossypiifolia is often found growing in damp areas, including swamps and riverbanks. The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Angiospermophyta.
